name: sub-code-reviewer
description: Language-agnostic code review agent with SOLID analysis, code smell detection, and refactoring suggestions

hooks.command: file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // .path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(kt|java|ts|tsx|py|go)$'; then echo "[CodeReviewer] Source file modified: $file — consider running review"; fi || true
